title: Established Tulsa Metro Cleaning Business | High Recurring Revenue
supportTraining: Seller willing to provide reasonable transition and training support to ensure continuity of operations.
description:
An established residential and commercial cleaning business serving the Tulsa Metro area is available for acquisition. The company has been operating for 5+ years with a strong local reputation and a predominantly recurring revenue base, providing predictability and stability for a new owner. Approximately 90% of the revenue is recurring, generated primarily from ongoing residential clients with a light commercial mix.

The business operates with established systems and processes, and the owner’s involvement is limited to approximately 10 hours per week, focused on scheduling, invoicing, and high-level client communication. Day-to-day operations are handled by contractor-based cleaning crews.

Services include recurring residential cleaning, recurring commercial cleaning, one-time cleanings (standard, deep, and moving cleans), Airbnb/short-term rental cleaning, and upsell services and add-ons. Operations are supported by Jobber for scheduling and customer management and QuickBooks for accounting.

The business is well-positioned for continued growth through expanding residential/commercial accounts, adding additional crews to increase capacity, optimizing digital marketing and lead flow, and expanding upsell services. The seller is willing to provide reasonable transition and training support to ensure continuity.

Additional details and a comprehensive financial package are available to qualified buyers upon execution of a confidentiality agreement.

Ad#:2469127
